Traditional Chinese

	 Simplified Chinese

	 Pronunciation

	 Pinyin (Tones)

	 Wade-Giles 
	Mêng Ta (Tzŭ-ching)

	 Birthplace 
	Youfufeng near Chang’an

	 Other Names 
	Zidu, 子度

	 Name Notes 
	Meng Da was originally styled Zijing (子敬), but later changed his style to Zidu (子度) because the uncle of his lord, Liu Bei, was named Liu Jing.

full_text:
Meng Da (Zijing) 孟達 (子敬)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Da (孟達), styledZijing (子敬), was born in Youfufeng near Chang’an. Refused aid to Guan Yu. Defeated by Sima Yi. In novel, kills Xu Huang. Meng Da was affiliated with Liu Zhang, the Shu Kingdom, and the Wei Kingdom. Meng Da lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
